name: microsoft-office
description: Local Codex plugin for detailed work with Microsoft Word documents and Excel workbooks.

interface.shortDescription: Create, inspect, edit, and verify Word and Excel files.
interface.longDescription: Adds detailed Codex workflows for Microsoft Word .docx documents and Excel .xlsx/.xlsm workbooks, including structure inspection, content extraction, safe edits, formatting-aware guidance, and validation steps.
defaultPrompt: Review this Word document and fix formatting.
Analyze this Excel workbook and explain formulas.
Create a polished DOCX or XLSX file.
